<!--
This template is for HUMAN-authored PRs. It is ignored by:
  - `claude/*` routine PRs (opened with `gh pr create --fill`, body = commit message)
  - Dependabot PRs (body generated by Dependabot)
Both are squash-merged untouched by `.github/workflows/auto-merge-claude.yml` and
Dependabot's own flow, so this template never edits their bodies.

Fields mirror the ROUTINE.md "Commit + push" contract (see ROUTINE.md §5)
so a human PR and a routine PR read the same way in the merged history.
Delete a field heading entirely if it does not apply — do not leave empty stubs.
-->

**Leaf:** <!-- leaf-id + description copied verbatim from ROADMAP.md, e.g. `L5.30 add .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`. If this PR is not roadmap-driven, replace with a one-line summary. -->

**Why:** <!-- One sentence on why this PR, now. Skip the heading entirely if the answer is "it was the next leaf". -->

**What changed:**
<!-- 2–4 bullets that name files and concepts, not just verbs. -->
-
-

**Design notes:** <!-- Non-obvious tradeoffs, deferred concerns, things the next contributor should know. Skip the heading if there are none. -->

**Cost:** <!-- Corgi USD spent + Claude prompt cost estimate, e.g. `$0.00 corgi, ~$0.05 prompt`. Use `$0.00 corgi, n/a prompt (human-authored)` for non-routine PRs. -->

**Mirror:** <!-- New/changed `*.md` and `*.csv` paths under `docs/`, `evals/`, `prompts/`, plus top-level planning docs. Or `mirror: not applicable (no docs touched)`. -->

**Next:** <!-- Leaf id + short description of the next likely roadmap pick. Skip if not roadmap-driven. -->
